LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR BROWN S. CORONADO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. MISS CORONADO DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S INSTRUCTIONS IN THE TENTATIVE RULING TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING AND TO BRING WAGE AND/OR PAY STATEMENTS FOR HER LAST 4 PAYCHECKS TO DEMONSTRATE HER INCOME. calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. BRANDON TANG, ESQ., Tel No. 510-896-9411 specially appearing for Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) N.A.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted by Plaintiff's counsel. The Court rules as follows: Judgment Debtor Brown S. Coronado's Claim of Exemption is granted in part as to $4851.58. The balance of $2000 shall be released to the judgment creditor. Court shall sign and send out formal order to parties and Sheriff's Office. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - Defendant/Judgment Debtor Brown S. Coronado's Claim of Exemption is denied. Miss Coronado did not comply with the Court's instructions in the tentative ruling to appear at the hearing and to bring wage and/or pay statements for her last 4 paychecks to demonstrate her income. Order signed after hearing. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Off Calendar
